productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Pack of 2 Black Socks
description: Pack of two pairs of socks in navy grey and blackIt's comfort unparalleled once you slip into these pairs of socks from United Colors of  Benetton. A glimpse of these socks from beneath a rolled up pair of jeans adds a hint of eccentricity to your classic style.Made of 73% cotton, 25% nylon and 2% elastaneBlack socks with brand name on the sides of the midfoot Grey socks with brand name on the sides of the midfoot and has polka dotsSock careMachine wash cold in not more than 30 degreesDo not dry cleanUse non-chlorine bleach if neededTumble dry lowDo not iron
